label: Whitepaper data refresh — 25K only (v0.70.05 dest fix)
hypothesis: Replace pre-NH-1 era benchmarks in the whitepaper §15 with NH-1-generation numbers at 25K. The 50K case is covered by the v0.70.04 bandwidth-distribution sweep already on disk, so we don't re-run it here. The previous attempt at this refresh hung the browser tab during the (G-DHT, dest, 50K) cell because of an O(N) per-lookup filter+reduce; the v0.70.05 dest fix replaces it with a single-pass cached scan and zero per-lookup allocations.
